zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Clyvedon於大約1287年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾時，他的父親Matthew de Clyvedon27歲，母親Sara Malherb23歲。他於1309年與Emme Clivedon在英國格盧斯特斯爾哈爾費爾德結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1373年在英國格盧斯特斯爾恩波利享年88歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Clyvedon于大约1287年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾时，他的父亲Matthew de Clyvedon27岁，母亲Sara Malherb23岁。他于1309年与Emme Clivedon在英国格盧斯特斯爾哈爾費爾德结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1373年在英国格盧斯特斯爾恩波利享年88岁。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Clyvedon was born about 1287, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Matthew de Clyvedon, was 27 and his mother, Sara Malherb, was 23. He married Emme Clivedon in 1309, in Charfield, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died about 1373, in Thornbury, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 88.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Clyvedon est né environ 1287, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Matthew de Clyvedon, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Sara Malherb, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Emme Clivedon en 1309, à Charfield, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1373, à Thornbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 88 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Clyvedon um 1287 in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Matthew de Clyvedon 27 und seine Mutter Sara Malherb 23. Er hat 1309 in Charfield, Gloucestershire, England Emme Clivedon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1373 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Thornbury, Gloucestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Clyvedon è nato il circa 1287 nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Matthew de Clyvedon, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Sara Malherb, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Emme Clivedon nel 1309, nel Charfield, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì circa 1373, nel Thornbury, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 88 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Clyvedonが約1287年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Matthew de Clyvedonは27歳，母Sara Malherbは23歳であった。1309年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアチャーフィールドでEmme Clivedonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1373年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアソルンブリーで88歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Clyvedon(이)가 대략 1287년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Matthew de Clyvedon(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Sara Malherb(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1309년 영국 그루스스터실르 처필드에서 Emme Clivedon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1373년 영국 그루스스터실르 토른버이에서 88세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Clyvedon nasceu aproximadamente 1287, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Matthew de Clyvedon, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Sara Malherb, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Emme Clivedon em 1309, em Charfield, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1373, em Thornbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 88 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Clyvedon родился около 1287 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Matthew de Clyvedon было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Sara Malherb, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Emme Clivedon в 1309 г. в местности чарфиелд, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер около 1373 г. в местности таурнбури, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 88 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Clyvedon nació aproximadamente 1287, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Matthew de Clyvedon, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Sara Malherb, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Emme Clivedon en 1309, en Charfield, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1373, en Thornbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 88 años.
